seed_text: Nothing great was ever achieved without enthusiasm
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism
aura_sensing:
!  Little gold confetti that will never stop falling.

*   **Sense:** Everything you need is already here, waiting to float into you.
